title: Coco Gauff Plays in Her First Miami Open Final
summary: Coco Gauff, a young American tennis player, won her match against Karolina Muchova to reach her first Miami Open final. She will play against Aryna Sabalenka, who is the world number one, for the title. Gauff is from Florida and is 22 years old. She won her match easily, losing only two games. Sabalenka also won her match against Elena Rybakina to get to the final. Gauff will move up to third in the world rankings next week. She is happy to play at home with family support. Sabalenka has been playing very well this year, winning many matches. The final will be exciting as both players have won six matches against each other before.

background_read: The Miami Open is a big tennis tournament in Florida. Coco Gauff is a young American player who is doing very well. Aryna Sabalenka is from Belarus and is the top player in the world. They are both trying to win the title. Tennis matches are played in sets, and winning in straight sets means you win all the sets. Players move up in rankings when they win matches. Family support can help players feel confident.

WHAT: Gauff reached her first Miami Open final and will play Sabalenka
WHERE: Miami Open tournament in Florida
WHY: To compete for the championship title and improve rankings
